gold_change_reason: Seed solution did not preserve comments or handle special characters; scaled task requires a custom ConfigParserWithComments class and modified main to include comments and special character values.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must check that comment lines are present in the output file.
Scaled executable cases must verify that special characters are preserved in the output file.
Scaled executable cases must include assertions on file content (sections, options, order).
implementation_notes: Defined a ConfigParserWithComments class that overrides the write method to include comments stored in a _comments dict.
Modified the main function to create a config with comments and special characters, then serialize and print the file content.
